scripts/gen_mock_eiaa_redline_fixture.py: Fixture generator (data tooling) that writes the eiaa mock-output docx the DTS mock pipeline copies as its canned redline; the literal names the artifact being generated, not a playbook_id resolution/comparison.
scripts/generate_gold_fixtures.py: Fixture generator; its only 'eiaa' mention is in the module docstring (already exempt as a docstring) -- listed here defensively per issue #289's ticket text.
scripts/generate_synthetic_standard_form: Fixture generator (data tooling) that synthesizes the placeholder eiaa standard-form .docx (issue #200); the literal names the specific artifact/output file, not a playbook_id comparison.
scripts/canonicalize.py: Golden-hash fixture recorder (--record flag, _record_golden_hash()): the 'eiaa playbook' description text and playbook_path key describe which artifact was hashed in the recorded fixture, not a resolution-path literal. Not one of issue #289's five spots.
scripts/docs-lint.py: Standalone docs-consistency checker hardcoded to audit the eiaa playbook's claims against ARCHITECTURE.md/docs/*; a doc-audit tool over one fixed target file, not part of the reviewable-playbook resolution path. Not one of issue #289's five spots.
